creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
BUMP_FD_SETSIZE is obsolete as poll() is now being used consistently.

The update builds in poudriere and passes portlint with
a couple of warnings:

fk@t520 /usr/ports $portlint -A www/privoxy/
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
WARN: Makefile: "BROKEN_STRPTIME_DESC" has to appear earlier.
WARN: Makefile: "USES" has to appear earlier.
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.
